No markdown." }, { role: "user", content: "Analyze this email and return the required agent JSON: " + $json.email_text + "\n\nRequired output for Classification Agent: return JSON with keys agent_name, design_pattern, category, priority, sentiment, action_required, reasoning. Use agent_name \"Email Classification Agent\" and design_pattern \"ReAct\"." }], temperature: 0.3 }) }}

nodes.name: Optional Gemini Fallback HTTP Request
nodes.notes: Optional fallback branch. Enable only if GEMINI_API_KEY is configured; keep keys in environment variables or credentials.

meta.description: Real importable MailOpsAI n8n workflow using base n8n HTTP Request nodes. Agent nodes call Groq with Authorization: Bearer {{$vars.GROQ_API_KEY}} and parser nodes fall back only when the Groq HTTP response has no completion.
